hausa.try_all_3_scale_views: Gwada dukan hanyoyi 3 na kallon ma'auni
hausa.design_5_fossil_energy_mix: Ƙera cakuɗar makamashi mai <5% na burbushin mai
hausa.ai_consultant: Mai Ba da Shawara na AI
hausa.set_5_detailed_habit_sliders: Saita sliders 5+ na ɗabi'a masu cikakke
hausa.build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Gina cakuɗar mafita mai jimlar 200+ Gt
hausa.zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Sifili fitarwa! Ƙafafunka su ne injin da ya fi kore.
hausa.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Hawa tare — kusan 0.3 kg CO₂ ga kowane ɗalibi kowace tafiya.
hausa.a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: Mota tana fitar da ~0.21 kg CO₂/km. Tafiye-tafiye kai kaɗai suna taruwa da sauri.
hausa.splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Raba tafiye-tafiye yana rage fitarwa ga kowane mutum 50-75%.
hausa.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: 'Ya'yan itace, kayan lambu, hatsi, wake — mafi ƙarancin sawun abinci.
hausa.some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Ɗan nama, ɗan kayan lambu. Cin abinci matsakaici.
hausa.lots_of_meat_dairy: Nama da kayan kiwo da yawa
hausa.beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Naman shanu yana samar da 60 kg CO₂ ga kowace kg na nama.
hausa.us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: Grid na Amurka: ~0.4 kg CO₂ ga kowace kWh.
hausa.coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Grid masu kwal mai yawa: har zuwa 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
hausa.composting_diverts_methane_producing_w: Yin takin ƙasa yana karkatar da shara mai samar da methane.
hausa.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Sake amfani yana ceton ~ton 1 na CO₂ ga kowace ton na kayan.
hausa.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote: Jujin shara suna samar da methane (mai ƙarfi 28× fiye da CO₂).
hausa.typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Motar man fetur ta Amurka ta gama-gari: 0.21 kg CO₂e/km.
hausa.carpool_of_3_cuts_per_person_emissions: Hawa tare na mutane uku yana rage fitarwa ga kowane mutum 65%.
hausa.electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Jirgin ƙasa na lantarki ya fi mota tsafta 4×.
hausa.improves_as_the_grid_decarbonizes: Yana inganta yayin da grid ke cire carbon.
hausa.zero_emissions_also_health_benefits: Sifili fitarwa. Har da amfanin lafiya.
hausa.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Jirgin sama yana da tasirin ɗumama 2-3× fiye da CO₂ kaɗai.
hausa.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Tafiya ɗaya mai nisa ta zuwa-da-dawowa = ~ton 3 — shekara ɗaya na tuƙi ga mutane da yawa.
hausa.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e ga kowace kg na naman shanu — mafi girma cikin dukan abinci.
hausa.second_highest_emitter_after_beef: Na biyu mafi girman fitarwa, bayan naman shanu.
hausa.varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Ya bambanta: salmon na gona ya fi girma, cod na daji ya fi ƙasa.
hausa.dairy_cattle_also_produce_methane: Shanun kiwo ma suna samar da methane.
hausa.about_1_10_the_impact_of_a_beef_meal: Kusan 1/10 na tasirin cin naman shanu.
hausa.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Wake + shinkafa + kayan lambu = mafi ƙarancin sawu mai yiwuwa.
hausa.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Kofunan zubarwa suna ƙara ~50% idan aka kwatanta da na gida.
hausa.food_waste_8_of_global_emissions: Ɓarnar abinci = 8% na fitarwa ta duniya.
hausa.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gas na halitta: ~2 kg/therm. Lokacin sanyi kawai.
hausa.us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: Matsakaicin grid na Amurka; ƙasa a CA, sama a WV.
hausa.4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnace: Mai inganci 4× fiye da tanderun gas.
hausa.shorter_shower_linear_savings: Gajeren wanka = ceto na kai tsaye.
hausa.laundry_load_warm_wash: Kaya guda na wanki (wanki mai ɗumi)
hausa.cold_wash_saves_75_of_this: Wankin sanyi yana ceton 75% na wannan.
hausa.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Rahoton Netflix 2023 — ƙasa da tsofaffin ƙiyasi.
hausa.4k_uses_4_the_bandwidth_of_hd: 4K yana amfani da ~4× na bandwidth na HD.
hausa.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e ga kowane umarnin rubutu. Tambayoyin dogon mahallin (1M token) suna kashe ~3× fiye.
hausa.dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30g ga kowane hoto. Nauyi 5–10× fiye da rubutu.
hausa.ai_video_generation_short_clip: Samar da bidiyo ta AI (gajeren clip)
hausa.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g ga kowane clip. Yana ƙaruwa kai tsaye da tsawon clip + ƙudurin hoto. Nauyi 50×+ fiye da rubutu.
hausa.ai_voice_tts_generation: Samar da murya / TTS ta AI
hausa.elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3g ga kowane gajeren clip.
hausa.copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: umarnan lamba na dogon mahalli ~5g kowanne.
hausa.polyester_lifetime_of_oil_extraction: Polyester = rayuwa gaba ɗaya na hakar mai.
hausa.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Ajiye wayoyi shekaru 3+ don rage rabin tasirin shekara.
hausa.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Aikawa na kwana 2 = 3× na aikawa mai jinkiri.
hausa.shein_temu_avg_25_kg_per_order: Shein/Temu matsakaici: 25 kg ga kowane oda.
hausa.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote_2: Jujin shara suna samar da methane (mai ƙarfi 28× fiye da CO₂).
hausa.negative_recycling_avoids_emissions: Korau! Sake amfani yana guje wa fitarwa.
hausa.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Yana guje wa methane KUMA yana gina carbon na ƙasa.
hausa.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Ruwan famfo = mai tsafta ~500× ta fuskar fitarwa.
hausa.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Abin da kowane mutum ke buƙatar cimma nan da 2030 don kasancewa ƙasa da 1.5°C.
hausa.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Biranen kamar Burlington, Vermont sun riga suna aiki da wutar lantarki mai sabuntawa 100%!
hausa.a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: Fayil mai bambanci shi ne hanya mafi juriya.
hausa.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Denmark ta riga tana samun 55% na wutar lantarkinta daga iska.
hausa.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Duniya tana ƙara makamashi mai sabuntawa da sauri fiye da kowane lokaci.
hausa.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Ya tabbata shekaru 10,000. Yanayin Holocene da dukan wayewar ɗan adam ya girma a ciki.
hausa.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling ya fara sa ido kai tsaye kan CO₂ a Mauna Loa. Lanƙwasarsa ta tabbatar da cewa ɗumamar da ɗan adam ya jawo gaskiya ce.
hausa.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Masanin yanayi James Hansen ya gaya wa Majalisar Amurka cewa ɗumama ta fara. 350.org tana ganin 350 ppm a matsayin iyaka “mai aminci”.
hausa.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Karo na farko da CO₂ na sararin samaniya ya wuce 400 ppm cikin shekaru miliyan 3+. Zamanin ƙarshe na 400 ppm na Duniya: dazuzzukan tropics a sandunan duniya.
hausa.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Matakin yanzu. Mafi girma cikin aƙalla shekaru 800,000 (daga cores na kankara). Daidai da ~1.2°C na ɗumama.
hausa.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Iyaka mai alaƙa da ɗumamar 2°C idan ta dawwama. Manufar Yarjejeniyar Paris: kasancewa ƙasa da 1.5°C.
hausa.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Manyan al'amuran fararen murjani sun buga Great Barrier Reef a 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, da 2024. A ɗumamar 1.5°C, 70–90% na murjanin tropics suna mutuwa. A 2°C, 99% suna mutuwa.
hausa.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Kankara na Greenland yana da isasshen ruwa don ɗaga matakin teku mita 7 (23 ft). A ~1.5°C mai dawwama, narkewa ta zama wadda ba za a iya juyawa ba cikin ƙarnuka zuwa dubban shekaru.
hausa.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Zagayen AMOC yana ɗaukar zafi daga tropics zuwa Turai. Ya raunana 15% tun 1950. Cikakken tsayawa zai sanyaya arewacin Turai sosai yayin da yake ɓata damina a Afirka da Asiya.
hausa.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon yana samar da rabin ruwan samansa da kansa. Da sare bishiyoyi na 20–25% + hauhawar zafi, yana cikin haɗarin juyawa daga dajin ruwa zuwa savanna. Wasu binciken suna nuni cewa iyakar tana kusa da 2°C a saurin sare na yanzu.
hausa.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Permafrost na Arctic yana da carbon ninki biyu na wanda ke sararin samaniya yanzu. Da ɗumama 3–4× da sauri fiye da matsakaicin duniya, ya riga yana narkewa yana sakin CO₂ da methane (mai ƙarfi 28× fiye da CO₂ cikin shekaru 100).
hausa.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Kankara na teku da ke ƙarƙashin matakin teku. Ruwan teku mai zafi yana zaizayar da su daga ƙasa. Kankarar Thwaites (“Doomsday Glacier”) shi ne babban haɗari. Rushewa zai ɗaga matakin teku mita 3.3 (11 ft).
hausa.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Dazuzzukan arewa masu allura (Rasha, Kanada, Scandinavia) suna cikin damuwa daga ɗumama, ƙwarin haushi, da gobarar daji. Cikakken sauyawa zuwa ciyayi zai iya sakin carbon mai yawa da aka adana.
hausa.gulf_of_maine_rapid_warming: Ɗumamar Sauri na Gulf of Maine
hausa.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine ya ɗumama da sauri fiye da 99% na tekunan duniya tun 1980 — kusan 0.5°F kowane shekaru goma, kimanin 3× na matsakaicin teku na duniya. Igiyar sanyi ta Labrador ta raunana yayin da ruwan zafi na Gulf Stream ke kaiwa arewa sosai, yana sake tsara sarƙar abinci a lokaci na ainihi tun daga tushe. Al'ummomin bakin teku na Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, da Mi’kmaq sun rubuta waɗannan canje-canje a rubutun baki shekaru da dama kafin tauraron ɗan adam ya tabbatar.
hausa.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Wutar lantarki mafi arha a duniya a 2024. Iyawa tana ninkawa kowace shekara a yankuna da yawa.
hausa.utility_scale_solar_farms: Gonakin Rana na Matakin Kayan Aiki
hausa.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Wutar lantarki mafi arha a tarihi. Haɗa grid shi ne babban ƙalubale yanzu.
hausa.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Wadda aka rarraba + mai juriya. Dawowar kuɗi na tsarin 5kW na yau da kullun: shekaru 6–10.
hausa.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 na abinci ana ɓata. Hana ɓarna yana guje wa methane daga juji KUMA fitarwar noman abinci.
hausa.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Ba 100% vegan ba — har rage naman shanu 3× a mako yana da tasiri mai girma. Yana 'yantar da ƙasa don sake dashen daji.
hausa.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Maido da hekta 125M. Yana kare bambancin halittu + yana janyo CO₂ ta hanyar photosynthesis.
hausa.temperate_forest_restoration: Maido da Dajin Yanayi Mai Sanyi
hausa.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Dasa inda yanayin halitta ke tallafa wa girma. Ƙarin fa'idodi: sanyaya, kare wuraren ruwa.
hausa.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Haɗa bishiyoyi cikin ƙasar kiwo. Dabbobi suna samun inuwa; ƙasa tana adana carbon 4× fiye da ƙasar kiwo mara komai.
hausa.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: Ba noma ba + amfanin gona na rufi + jujjuya iri-iri. Yana gina carbon na ƙasa yayin da yake kiyaye amfani.
hausa.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Ƙasar peat tana adana carbon 3× fiye da dazuzzuka a duniya. Peat da aka busar = babban mai fitarwa.
hausa.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: Iskar HFCs tana da ƙarfi 1,000–9,000× fiye da CO₂. Gyaran Kigali (2016) yana cire su a hankali.
hausa.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EV suna samar da fitarwar rayuwa 50–70% ƙasa fiye da man fetur — yana inganta yayin da grid ke tsafta.
hausa.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Jiragen ƙasa na lantarki suna motsa fasinja-km da 1/10 na fitarwar mota.
hausa.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Biranen keke na Holland suna da 1/3 na fitarwar sufuri. Ababen more rayuwa suna ƙirƙirar ɗabi'a.
hausa.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Insulation + fanfunan zafi + fitilun LED. Gine-ginen Amurka suna amfani da 40% na makamashin farko.
hausa.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: Mai inganci 3–4× fiye da tandurun gas. Suna aiki har zuwa −15°C a samfuran yanayi mai sanyi na zamani.
hausa.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Koyaushe a saman jerin. Mata masu ilimi suna da 'ya'ya kaɗan KUMA rayuwa mai tasiri sosai. Yana taruwa a tsararraki.
hausa.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Yana maye gurbin wutar itace/gawayi. Fa'idodi: yanayi + gurɓataccen iska na cikin gida (yana kashe 4M/shekara) + sare dazuzzuka.
hausa.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Yana girma 60× da sauri fiye da bishiyoyin ƙasa. Yana ajiye CO₂ + maido da kamun kifi + taki.
hausa.other_waste_fugitive_aviation_bunkers: Sauran (shara, tsere, man jirgin sama da na jirgin ruwa)
hausa.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Ƙananan Fitarwa Ƙwarai — Ya Yi Daidai da Paris
hausa.very_high_fossil_fueled_growth: Babba Ƙwarai — Ci Gaba da Burbushin Mai ke Tafiyarwa
hausa.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Yi tafiya, keke, ko bas zuwa makaranta
hausa.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Gwada cin abinci ɗaya ba nama a mako
hausa.talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Yi magana da iyalinka game da zaɓin makamashi
hausa.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Dasa bishiya ko fara lambun makaranta
hausa.start_a_recycling_program_at_school: Fara shirin sake amfani a makaranta
hausa.organize_a_climate_awareness_event: Shirya taron wayar da kai kan yanayi
hausa.route_carbon_hint: Ƙiyasta abubuwan da ke haddasa sawu.
hausa.climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Gajerun hanyoyin madannai: 1 zuwa 6 suna canza shafuka, Q yana canza tambayoyi.
hausa.export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Fitar da rahoton yanayinka zuwa clipboard
hausa.hero_ppm: CO₂ yau: ~424 ppm — mafi girma cikin shekaru miliyan 3+
hausa.mission_panel_copy: Matsa daga bayanan kai zuwa shaidar duniya, adalci, da mafita. Dakunan gwaje-gwaje na manufa da ƙarfi masu ci gaba suna nan lokacin da ka faɗaɗa su.
hausa.hide_advanced_labs: Ɓoye dakunan gwaje-gwaje na ci gaba
hausa.show_advanced_labs: Nuna dakunan gwaje-gwaje na ci gaba
hausa.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Gida na matsakaici na Amurka yana fitar da ~ton 16 na CO₂/shekara. Manyan na'urori su ne dumama gida, sufuri, da cin abinci — ba bambaron robobi ba.
hausa.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Rana + iska yanzu sun fi arha fiye da sabbin masana'antun burbushin mai a yawancin kasuwanni. Sashen mai wuya shi ne haɗa grid, ba tsadar samarwa ba.
hausa.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Auna CO₂ kai tsaye a Mauna Loa tun 1958 — rikodin sararin samaniya mafi tsawon aiki. Tsarin haƙoran zare ya samo asali ne daga photosynthesis na Arewacin Duniya.
hausa.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Iyakoki inda tsarin ke canza yanayi ya kuma tsaya a can — narkewar Greenland, koma-bayan Amazon, raguwar AMOC. Aiki na baya-bayan nan yana nuni cewa da yawa na iya kusa fiye da yadda aka zata.
hausa.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Ƙasashen da suka fitar mafi ƙanƙanta suna fuskantar mafi munin tasiri. Yanayi batu ne na adalci da farko — rauni yana bin kuɗin shiga, yanki, da alhaki na tarihi.
hausa.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown yana jera mafita 100 bisa gigatons na CO₂ da aka guje. Kayan sanyaya, ɓarnar abinci, da ilmantar da 'yan mata suna kan gaba — ba abin da yawancin mutane ke tsammani ba.
hausa.climate_policy_pathways_40_year_maine_: Hanyoyin Manufar Yanayi: yaƙin neman zaɓe na shekaru 40 na Maine
hausa.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Nuni na hoton chart na donut na sawun carbon na Climate Explorer mai hulɗa
hausa.interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Nuni na jadawalin lokaci na fitarwa na Climate Explorer mai hulɗa
hausa.annual_global_co2_emission_rate: Adadin fitar da CO2 na duniya na shekara
hausa.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: An kulle a ~1.5°C na ɗumama mai dawwama. Yawancin daidaita bakin teku har yanzu yana yiwuwa da katangar teku, ja da baya da aka sarrafa.
hausa.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Mai alaƙa da ~2.5°C na ɗumama. Yana raba mutane fiye da kowane yaƙi a tarihi. Ambaliyar guguwa ta zama masifa ga yankunan cikin gida.
hausa.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Mai yiwuwa nan da 2300 a 3°C. Ƙasashe gaba ɗaya suna rasa yankin da za a iya zama. New Orleans, Venice, da yawancin Vietnam.
hausa.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Alkawari na ƙarnuka da yawa a ɗumamar 4°C. Yana buƙatar rushewar Greenland + Yammacin Antarctica. Ana sake rubuta yanayin bakin teku na wayewar ɗan adam har abada.
hausa.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: An kulle da Greenland + yawancin Yammacin Antarctica sun ɓace. Bakin teku mai zafi na zamanin Pliocene. Ƙarnuka da dama zuwa dubban shekaru don cikawa gaba ɗaya.
hausa.cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — lura: ~25% na dukan CO₂ na tarihi
hausa.record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Shekarar rikodi — ambaliyar Pakistan kaɗai ta raba ~8.2M
hausa.welcome_the_people_the_climate_is_alre: Maraba da mutanen da yanayi ya riga yana matsar da su
hausa.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Matsa lamba don ƙara alkawarin Asusun Asara da Lalacewa
hausa.read_the_people_you_just_heard_from: Karanta game da mutanen da ka ji daga yanzu
hausa.show_up_where_the_decisions_actually_g: Bayyana inda ake yanke shawara da gaske
hausa.ipcc_first_assessment_report: Rahoton Kima na Farko na IPCC
hausa.un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: Yarjejeniyar Tsari ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya kan Sauyin Yanayi
hausa.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS ta ba da shawarar Asara da Lalacewa a COP1 Berlin
hausa.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC ta fara bin diddigin ƙaura saboda yanayi
hausa.paris_agreement_article_8_mentions_l_d: Yarjejeniyar Paris — Sashe na 8 yana ambaton L&D
hausa.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Hukuncin UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand
hausa.world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: Rahoton World Bank Groundswell Sashe na II
hausa.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — an ƙirƙiri Asusun L&D
hausa.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubai — an ba Asusun L&D jari
hausa.ipcc_1_5_c_deadline_target_year: Ranar ƙarshe na IPCC 1.5°C (shekarar da aka nufa)
hausa.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Babu wani babban al'amari na siyasa ko yanayi. Aikin manufa na yau da kullun ya ci gaba.
hausa.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Ka cimma cire carbon mai zurfi a fannoni, ka gina juriya, ka kuma sanya adalci a tsakiya. Haka nasarar sauyin yanayi take yayin da yarjejeniyar zamantakewa ta riƙe.
hausa.decarbonized_but_uneven: An Cire Carbon amma Ba Daidai ba
hausa.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Cire carbon mai yawa a fannonin makamashi da sufuri, amma daidaitawa da adalci sun ragu baya. Lanƙwasoshin carbon daidai ne; haɗin gwiwar siyasa mai rauni ne.
hausa.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Wasu fannonin sun ci gaba. Wasu sun tsaya cak. Goyon bayan jama'a ya lalace da lokaci. Wannan ita ce hanyar da yawancin manufofin yanayi na duniya na gaske suka bi.
hausa.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Cire carbon ya tsaya cak. Gibin daidaitawa ya faɗaɗa. Goyon bayan jama'a ya rushe. Wannan ita ce hanyar da muke ƙoƙarin gujewa: tasirin yanayi na taruwa ba tare da ababen zamantakewa ko fasaha na amsawa ba.
hausa.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Yanayin farko yana yiwuwa. Rarraba jari a fannoni 2-3 a lokaci na farko don gano waɗanne dokokin amsawa ke fara aiki. Ilimin jama'a + majalisun 'yan ƙasa suna biya a hankali amma da dawwama.
hausa.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Amsawa mai kyau ta mamaye; Duniya tana ɗumama zuwa daidaito mai zafi. (Gaskiya “mara sarrafuwa” greenhouse — tekuna suna tafasa suna ƙafewa — yanayi ne na Venus, ba Duniya ba a waɗannan ƙarfin.)
hausa.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Babban albedo + amsawa mara kyau. Hanyar zamanin ƙanƙara.
hausa.net_forcing_0_w_m_earth_equilibrium: Ƙarfin gaba ɗaya ≈ 0 W/m². Daidaiton Duniya.
hausa.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Ƙarfi suna soke junansu wani ɓangare. Yanayi yana kauda a hankali.
hausa.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Zanen daidaiton makamashi: hasken rana mai gajeren zango yana ratsa cikin tabbar iskar greenhouse yana ɗumama saman; saman yana fitar da infrared, wanda tabbar iska ke sha wani ɓangare ta sake fitarwa ƙasa, tana kama zafi.
hausa.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Zato: Yaushe albedo ke shawo kan ƙarfin GHG?
hausa.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Bayyana yadda albedo, amsawar gizagizai, da GHGs ke tafiyar da yanayin yanayi tare.
